text:
@XFreeze Neuralink is a much bigger breakthrough than most people realize. 

Enabling people to control a computer with their mind and the completely blind to see are Jesus-level miracles.
summary: @XFreeze Neuralink is a much bigger breakthrough than most people realize. Enabling people to control a computer with their mind and the completely blind to see are Jesus-level miracles.

parent.text: Starship may end up being the last truly gigantic engineering marvel built entirely by human hands and 20-watt biological meat computers before AI fundamentally transforms how civilization designs and builds everything
parent.name: X Freeze
parent.embed_html:
Starship may end up being the last truly gigantic engineering marvel built entirely by human hands and 20-watt biological meat computers before AI fundamentally transforms how civilization designs and builds everything pic.twitter.com/TWeV6k3q9p

— X Freeze (@XFreeze) May 23, 2026

ai_summary: The thread discusses two major engineering and technology breakthroughs: Starship as humanity's last large-scale engineering project before AI transforms design and manufacturing, and Neuralink as a transformative technology enabling brain-computer interfaces and restoring vision to the blind. The business insight is that Neuralink represents a paradigm shift in human-computer interaction and medical technology that will fundamentally alter how humans interact with technology and how companies design products, relating directly to SpaceX (Starship) and Neuralink's product roadmaps.
embed_html:
Neuralink is a much bigger breakthrough than most people realize.

Enabling people to control a computer with their mind and the completely blind to see are Jesus-level miracles.

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 24, 2026

text:
Grok foundation model V9-Medium (1.5T) has finished training. Evals look good. A lot of Cursor data was added in supplementary training and there is more to come.

Fine-tuning is underway and reinforcement learning begins in a few days. 2 to 3 weeks to public release. 

This will
summary: Grok foundation model V9-Medium (1.5T) has finished training. Evals look good. A lot of Cursor data was added in supplementary training and there is more to come. Fine-tuning is underway and reinforcement learning begins in a few days. 2 to 3 weeks to public release. This will
ai_summary: Elon Musk announced that xAI's Grok foundation model V9-Medium (1.5T parameters) has completed training with positive evaluation results, incorporating Cursor data in supplementary training, with fine-tuning and reinforcement learning underway and public release expected in 2-3 weeks. This represents a significant product development milestone for xAI's AI model, demonstrating progress on competing large language model infrastructure and the strategic integration of third-party training data to accelerate capability improvements.
embed_html:
Grok foundation model V9-Medium (1.5T) has finished training. Evals look good. A lot of Cursor data was added in supplementary training and there is more to come.

Fine-tuning is underway and reinforcement learning begins in a few days. 2 to 3 weeks to public release.

This will…

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 25, 2026

text: Grok Build improving every day, 7 days a week https://t.co/G0rJLAc9AB
summary: Grok Build improving every day, 7 days a week
ai_summary: Elon Musk announces that Grok Build, xAI's AI development tool, is undergoing continuous improvement with a 7-day-per-week development cadence. This demonstrates xAI's commitment to rapid iteration and competitive product development in the AI tools space, highlighting the operational intensity required to ship improvements at scale in the generative AI market.
